meta_title: For Freelancers: project management to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Project Management to Solve Debugging Hell
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with unfixable bugs. Use this advanced project management workflow with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster and impress clients.
content.answer_block: Debugging failures often stem from poor architecture, not just code errors. By integrating project management into your development loop using Antigravity for architectural mapping and Claude Code for iterative execution, you treat code as a modular system, reducing technical debt and identifying breaking points before they crash your production environment.
content.intro:
You are three hours into a 'simple' client request, staring at a terminal that refuses to cooperate. The code is a labyrinth of spaghetti logic, and the stack trace is a cryptic language you didn't sign up to translate. The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and your reputation is on the line. You aren't just stuck; you are architecturally misaligned.

True mastery isn't about being a human compiler; it's about engineering a system where bugs become impossible to hide. By shifting your workflow from reactive hacking to proactive project management, you turn debugging from a desperate scavenger hunt into a surgical procedure. Let’s dismantle the chaos and rebuild your process for speed, scale, and sanity.

steps.title: Architectural Audit with Antigravity
steps.description: Before fixing code, map the dependencies. Use Antigravity to visualize the data flow and identify where the state management is breaking.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current directory for architectural bottlenecks. Create a dependency graph highlighting potential circular references or state management conflicts.

steps.title: Isolation of Concerns
steps.description: Break the monolithic debugging task into atomic units. Use Claude Code to isolate the failing function into a testable sandbox.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Decompose the identified failing module into three independent, testable components based on the current data flow constraints.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Isolate the logic in src/auth.ts into a standalone unit testable file.'

steps.title: Automated Hypothesis Testing
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate edge-case inputs that force the bug to manifest consistently, removing guesswork from your debugging.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of 10 extreme input scenarios that stress-test the isolated component identified in Step 2.

steps.title: Refactor via Predictive Modeling
steps.description: Apply the fix using a 'Plan-First' approach. Validate the solution against the architectural constraints mapped in Step 1.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a refactor for the identified bug that adheres to the established project architecture and prevents regression.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit --apply-refactor --context 'Fixing race condition in state store'

steps.title: Regression Guardrail Implementation
steps.description: Lock in the fix by creating a permanent guardrail in your project management layer so the bug never returns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a CI/CD integration rule that monitors the specific architectural path for the bug we just resolved.

pro_tips: Always treat your terminal history as a project log; use Claude Code's session context to maintain state across complex refactors.
Never debug in the main branch; create an 'investigation' branch that Antigravity can analyze without polluting production code.
Use Antigravity to generate documentation for your client; showing them the architectural map builds more trust than just sending a 'fixed' message.
If a bug takes longer than 30 minutes, you are fixing the symptom, not the source. Stop, pivot, and re-map the architecture.
Automate your feedback loop by linking your project management board directly to your Claude Code execution logs.
content.next_steps: Integrate these steps into your standard project template, automate your environment setup, and focus on delivering high-impact features rather than firefighting.
content.conversion_block: Ready to stop fighting your code and start scaling your freelance business? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
